findings: Main position cards are sourced from open paper trades only via openPaperPositions built from /api/trades.
Shadow-only advisory entries do not feed main cards; shadow remains in diagnostics/background sections.
Real live PnL logic for paper positions uses actual qty, actual entry_px, and current_price when available.
Current-price stale handling is explicit in the card label: 'Current (stale)' when shadow enrichment price is unavailable.
All main open-position counts are intended to derive from the same normalized openPaperPositions array.
remaining_mismatch_detail: Count ownership is still slightly timing-sensitive because renderState() writes kpi-open/cmd-open from /api/state before renderUnifiedPositions() overwrites them from openPaperPositions. In the observed live snapshot both truths matched at 1, so no user-facing count break was present, but source ownership is still split across two render paths.

zero_open_specific_check.reason: At verification time there was 1 real open paper trade, not 0.

conclusion: The dashboard truth fix holds in live behavior for the main requirement: main cards come from real open paper trades only and shadow stays diagnostic. Remaining work is minor truth-source ownership polish rather than a fundamental truth-layer failure.
